title: The TechnoBlade
description: In remembrance of the Technobalde, I made a mod which adds a sword, his Crown and an Enchantment
body:
### **Update for the Mod v1.0.2. Please Read Changelog.**    


Hi.                                                                                                        
You can Ask me for any Version above 1.16 And can also give me suggestions for New Mods in my Discord Server which is linked in the Links Section.                                                  

Inspired by Kova's Mod "Herobrine Sword" on CurseForge                                                                     
And Marvel's Mjolnir for the theme of the Sword                                                          
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/herobrines-sword](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/herobrines-sword)

This is my 1st Mod here.                                                                                          
This mod is made in remembrance of a king "TECHNOBLADE NEVER DIES"                                                
This mod adds a Sword "The Techno Blade" and an Enchantment "Saturation" and NOW as of v1.0.2 his crown named "Blades Crown".                                                                     
Description of the Crown:-

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To get this crown you have to upgrade a Netherite Helmet with a Gold Block and a Nether Star.
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeacb58ef4213d3563f804cb9c7b46ca57ec2c58_0.webp)

It is a bit Expansive But it will be worth it BCZ it gives you insane armor Protection as you can see by stats of it.
![Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7af593423fc13096baf7f610a9bddfd3aa9b8310_0.webp)
You're definitely not gonna die with the Maxed Out Crown as Technoblade used to say "Technoblade never dies".

</details>



![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/895e54a52c66a48049df630dbd39aa166383bef6.png)

![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf45171352a654db072a44046df3110a09c30770.png)

The Sword has 22 Atack Damege and 1.2 Attack Speed and can be crafted like this:-
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d91c0ab097cc7479d95c1685c454d43211568fea_0.webp)

When right clicked with this sword its summons a lightning where you are looking within 64 blocks radius (no need of thunderstorm weather) (Thor Approved)                                                                                       
It has durability of 250

This Enchantment in this mod is called "Saturation"                                                        
This Enchantment can only be applied to Helmets with cost of 15 XP Levels
![Cost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04faa959c006ab9da7aa7494a4bac94a0031aa3_0.webp)

This Enchantment gives player Saturation Effect when a applied (No need to carry food Ever Again)
![Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f80abeda28bdad462cc7fbf851fdeeb8285a06b9_0.webp)

This Enchantment can be traded with Villagers and can be found structures which have the Enchantments in  their loot tables. It is a rare enchantment.
![Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc3a124e5a981b29be6f5edd135b69f11127908e.png)

Thats it for the 1st mod :) Hope u guys will like this.                                                  
You can use this mod in your modpacks
